title: Integrated Llama7B attention energy-accounting frontier rerank on merged abstraction inputs
hypothesis: A rerun that consumes the merged abstraction-closure frontier artifact should make the currently selected Llama7B attention point comparable under explicit energy accounting and identify which measured versus parameterized service/energy terms remain open.

direct_comparison.primary_question: After adding explicit integrated-energy accounting to the merged abstraction-closure baseline, which Llama7B 131k attention frontier point remains dominant and which measured or parameterized energy terms still need closure?
include: Llama7B attention integrated energy-closure frontier rerank using 131k context.
substitute the merged L2 integrated abstraction-closure frontier artifact as the baseline input.
carry over existing merged datapath/NOC/HBM/SRAM and precision assumptions into one measured-plus-parameterized energy pass.
report remaining energy abstractions as a named table with one-line sensitivity notes per term.
exclude: new model-quality gate jobs beyond the existing merged 7B frontier evidence
new compute datapath micro-architecture synthesis or synthesis-aware scheduler redesign
follow_on_broad_sweep: Target one remaining energy abstraction from the report with a dedicated closure job if it materially changes frontier selection.

expected_benefit: Produces a frontier ranking where compute, SRAM, NoC/HBM service, and precision-energy terms are explicit and labeled by evidence strength.
Reuses merged abstraction-closure artifacts so no repeated abstraction assumptions are reintroduced.
Generates a concrete energy-closure handoff artifact for follow-on focused refinement.
risks: The rerun can only expose, not remove, remaining aggregate energy model assumptions in HBM service, NoC contention, and arbitration.
If the merged abstraction-closure baseline is revised, the rerank must be rerun to stay synchronized.
Energy closure may shift ranking due to methodology details not aligned with existing throughput normalization.

required_evaluations.objective: Integrate the merged L2 abstraction-closure frontier into one measured-plus-parameterized energy-closure rerank for Llama7B attention.

expected_result.reason: Identify the reranked Llama7B 131k attention frontier while exposing remaining integrated-energy abstractions.
